name: Roll Out the Lasagna
recipeIngredient: 1 large clove Garlic, minced and divided
2 cans Cream of Tomato Soup, undiluted
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook noodles according to package directions and drain.
2. Arrange noodles overlapping ½ inch in a rectangle.
3. Combine cottage cheese, cream cheese, half the garlic, half the pepper, and half the Parmesan cheese. Spread mixture on noodles.
4. Roll as for jelly roll.
5. Place roll in a shallow baking dish (10-inch x 6-inch or 13-inch x 9-inch).
6. Combine soup, water, oregano, and remaining garlic and pepper; pour over noodles.
7. Sprinkle with remaining Parmesan cheese.
8. Bake at 350°F for 30 minutes.
Serves 4.
Note:
This is intended to be a meatless dish, but is very good with meat balls which have been seasoned with Italian seasoning.
